ddls:
CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the match season */,
  "team_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first team */,
  "team_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second team */,
  "matchday" INTEGER /* Matchday number */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Stadium where the match is played */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee officiating the match */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("team_id_1") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("referee_id") REFERENCES referees ("referee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("team_id_2") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team belongs to */,
  "home_ground" TEXT /* Home stadium of the team */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., Forward, Defender) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player (in cm) */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player (in kg) */,
  "foot_dominance" TEXT /* Foot dominance (Right or Left) */,
  "market_value" INTEGER /* Estimated market value of the player */,
  "contract_expiry" TEXT /* Year the player's contract expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic entry */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player */,
  "fouls" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed by the player */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the player */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the player */,
  "shots" INTEGER /* Number of shots taken by the player */,
  "passes" INTEGER /* Number of passes made by the player */,
  "tackles" INTEGER /* Number of tackles made by the player */,
  "interceptions" INTEGER /* Number of interceptions made by the player */,
  "clearances" INTEGER /* Number of clearances made by the player */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Number of blocks made by the player */,
  "dribbles" INTEGER /* Number of successful dribbles made by the player */,
  "fouls_committed" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed by the player */,
  "fouls_suffered" INTEGER /* Number of fouls suffered by the player */,
  "substitution_in" TEXT /* Minute of substitution into the match */,
  "substitution_out" TEXT /* Minute of substitution out of the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player involved in the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., Goal, Foul) */,
  "minute" INTEGER /* Minute of the match the event occurred */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location on the field where the event occurred */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the event (e.g., goal, save, missed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_events_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_events_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the season */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "champion_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that won the championship in that season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_champion_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("champion_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "team_id_1_score" INTEGER /* Score of the first team */,
  "team_id_2_score" INTEGER /* Score of the second team */,
  "winner_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winning team */,
  "loser_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the losing team */,
  "draw" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the match ended in a draw */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_results_loser_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("loser_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_results_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_results_winner_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("winner_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach manages */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience as a coach */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the coach */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the coach */,
  "previous_clubs" TEXT /* List of previous clubs the coach has managed */,
  "awards" TEXT /* List of awards the coach has won */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "referees" (
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each referee */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the referee */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience as a referee */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the referee */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the referee */,
  "previous_matches" TEXT /* List of previous matches the referee has officiated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("referee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fan_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement entry */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of attendees at the match */,
  "social_media_mentions" INTEGER /* Number of social media mentions during the match */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the match by fans */,
  "positive_mentions" INTEGER /* Number of positive social media mentions */,
  "negative_mentions" INTEGER /* Number of negative social media mentions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fan_engagement_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)
